title: BYKITCHEN Tin Foil Dishes, 9 Inch 20 Pack Sturdy Aluminium Flan Cases with Lids, Disposable Foil Pie Plates, Round Aluminium Trays for Baking Cake and Cooking
features: Premium Quality: Made of high quality food grade aluminum foil, non-toxic and tasteless. The aluminum baking case is high temperature resistance. 100% safety for oven use
Foil Flan Dishes Size: Outer Diameter 23.5cm (9.3inch), Inner Diameter 20cm(7.8inch). Depth: 4cm(1.57 inch) 20pcs/set disposable pie pan. Great for baking, barbecue, cooking

Aluminum Containers with Lids: Our foil pie dishes can be used in the oven for baking cakes, pie, quiche,tart. It is good for roasting, broiling, BBQ, picnic and cooking. And It comes with 20pcs practical paper lids, great for taking away meals and storing your delicious food. They are also great for parties, Christmas, Thanksgiving,New year etc

20 PCS Foil Containers and 20 PCS Paper Lids: 20pcs, meet your various of needs. And easy to clean after use, just throw into a rubbish bin, save your clean-up time. It provides great convenience for baking and cooking. And it is eco-friendly and recyclable
Sturdy Foil Containers: Our round aluminum foil trays are sturdy enough for delivering meals. And it is freezing safe and oven safe
